title: Normalized Job
description: The deterministic parse of a pasted job description, produced by crates/jobparse from raw JD text (algorithm §F). It is the value contract on the jobparse->core seam (R-D1): jobparse validates its OUTPUT against this schema; core validates its INPUT against the same schema. The two crates stay fully decoupled — the seam is the JSON shape, symmetric with master-cv.schema.json. Field names are camelCase.

title.description: Job title parsed from the JD (may be empty if no title line is present).

company.description: Hiring company parsed from the JD (may be empty).

location.description: Location string parsed from the JD; empty when absent.

responsibilities.description: Responsibility lines parsed from the JD.

mustHave.description: Requirements classified must-have by the §F cue phrases (required | must have | essential | you will need | minimum | mandatory).

niceToHave.description: Requirements classified nice-to-have by the §F nice cues (preferred | desirable | bonus | nice to have | advantageous | ideally). Unmarked requirements default here.

keywords.description: Free keywords surfaced from the JD (optional).
